hero.eyebrow: AI Portfolio / Sociotechnical Design / Personal Brand
hero.intro: From sociology to advanced AI systems, my profile combines academic rigor, strategic vision, and product instinct to design intelligent solutions that people actually trust.
hero.quote: The best AI is not only accurate. It is interpretable, elegant, and built with a real understanding of people.

metrics.label: Academic path completed with top distinction
Bridge between technical systems and social complexity
Modern architectures for real business use cases

manifesto: I work where intelligence needs both precision and empathy. My background in sociology gives me a strong sensitivity for human systems, while my technical work in AI lets me turn that understanding into operational products.

I design AI ecosystems, retrieval pipelines, multi-agent workflows, and decision support tools with a clear principle: technology should not only impress, it should create trust, clarity, and measurable value.
This portfolio is meant to feel like the same thing I build for clients: ambitious, polished, and impossible to confuse with something generic.

impact: Designing generative and predictive AI architectures for next-generation automotive workflows.
Building explainable systems that connect experimentation, business intelligence, and decision support.
Turning advanced AI concepts into operational frameworks for real industrial use.
Architected Azure foundations for enterprise AI adoption.
Developed RAG assistants and vector-search solutions to unlock internal knowledge at scale.
Applied sociological frameworks to RLHF and evaluation tasks, improving alignment between model behavior and human expectations.
Analyzed player behavior datasets to predict churn and optimize economic balance.
Supported intelligent assistant and chatbot initiatives for user support scenarios.
